Query.tables: CP P GA PY PGA PP P2P CLP2P CLP CLGA
Query.Join: CP.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND GA.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' AND P2P.PARTY_A_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'SOLICITOR' AND P2P.PARTY_A_ID (+)= CP.PARTY_ID AND P2P.PARTY_B_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'NCP PAYEE' AND PP.PARTY_ID (+)= P2P.PARTY_B_ID AND PGA.PARTY_ID (+)= P2P.PARTY_B_ID AND PGA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE (+)= 'NCP PAYEE' AND PY.PARTY_ID (+)= P2P.PARTY_B_ID AND CLP2P.PARTY_A_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'SOLICITOR' AND CLP2P.PARTY_A_ID (+)= CP.PARTY_ID AND CLP2P.PARTY_B_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'CLAIMANT' AND CLP.PARTY_ID (+)= CLP2P.PARTY_B_ID AND CLGA.PARTY_ID (+)= CLP2P.PARTY_B_ID AND CLGA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE (+)= 'SERVICE'
